text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "lsass.exe modified a user's password hash in the SAM database (HKLM\\SAM\\SAM\\Domains\\Account\\Users\\000003E9\\F) and tampered with Windows Time service secure limits (HKLM\\System\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\W32Time\\SecureTimeLimits). These actions are highly unusual for lsass.exe and are indicative of credential access, manipulation, or time-based security bypass attempts.",
  "indicators": [
    "SAM database modification",
    "password hash modification",
    "W32Time service tampering",
    "SecureTimeLimits",
    "credential access"
  ]
}
